name: Hard Fudge Sauce for Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine and melt the butter and chocolate in the top portion of a double boiler over not boiling water, stirring to blend well.
2. Add the boiling water and blend thoroughly.
3. Add the sugar and corn syrup.
4. Place over direct heat.
5. Cover.
6. Let the sauce boil readily, but not too furiously, for 3 minutes. Do not stir!
7. For a conventional Hot Fudge Sauce (which does not harden on Ice Cream), uncover, reduce the heat and simmer 2 more minutes, all without stirring the sauce.
8. For a Fudge Sauce which will harden on Ice Cream, continue boiling, uncovered for 3 more minutes, without stirring the sauce. Add the vanilla just before serving.
Yields 1 Cup
